features: POWERFUL PRE-PAINT CLEANER: Ideal for cleaning and preparing surfaces before painting. Effectively removes dirt, grease, and grime, ensuring a clean and smooth surface for better paint adhesion. Great for use as a paint prep cleaner

ALL-PURPOSE HOUSEHOLD CLEANER : Versatile cleaner that’s perfect for cleaning kitchens, bathrooms, tiles, windows, and walls. Tackles tough dirt and grime for a sparkling clean, making it a must-have household cleaner.
CONVENIENT SPRAY FORMULA : Ready to use right out of the bottle. Simply spray on, wipe off with a cloth or sponge, and rinse with clean water. A fast and easy surface cleaner for everyday use.

STREAK-FREE FINISH : Works from bottom to top to avoid run lines, leaving surfaces clean and streak-free. Perfect for preparing surfaces for painting or achieving a polished finish on your household surfaces.
SAFE FOR ALL SURFACES: Suitable for use on walls, tiles, glass, and other common surfaces. Protects delicate areas and ensures safe, non-abrasive cleaning without leaving spots or residue.
description: Product Description Bartoline Sugar Soap Liquid is specially formulated for the cleaning and preparation of all paintwork. Enables the decorator to clean and remove dirt, grease, nicotine, etc, prior to painting and is also excellent as a general household cleaner. Simple to use, non-toxic and is available in standard bottles or a ready-to-use handy trigger spray removing the requirement to dilute with water prior to use. Ingredients Bartoline ready-to-use sugar soap Highly effective household cleaner Removes grease and dirt with ease Bartoline sugar soap liquid concentrate is specially formulated for the cleaning and preparation of all paintwork Easy to use
